title: Modify Shape (Direct)
description: Modify an existing airfoil shape with exact parameter values (no bounds or sampling).

base_csv.description: Path to the original shape CSV.

pt_idx.description: List of control point indices to modify (0-indexed).

values.description: List of [x, y, radius, edgy] for each index in pt_idx. Each value MUST be a number (no bounds).

name.description: Name for the new shape version.
